detime_component: price trend, price cycle, price residual, volume trend, volume residual
signal_rule: Walk-forward components from price and volume; record selected period and coverage
Use trend slope/strength and decomposed-trend moving averages instead of raw-price-only averages
Compute MACD on extracted trend and gate with residual/cycle/volume context
Replace raw MA stack with trend state plus risk and volume masks
Long when trend is intact and residual is temporarily cheap
main_risk: A downtrend can make residual dips persist

signal_rule: Trade residual_z/residual RSI/residual bands rather than raw price z-score; trend and cycle decide whether a dip is tradable
Require prior-channel breakout plus trend, cycle, residual-overextension and volume confirmation
Trade spread residual only when spread trend is stable
Rank assets by decomposition score with volatility and residual-stress caps

exit_rule: trend weakens, trend slope turns down, or residual stress
decomposition_role: trend generates signal; cycle/residual/volume manage timing and risk

entry_rule: weak trend and residual_z <= -entry_z for long; residual_z >= entry_z for short if allowed
exit_rule: residual_z returns near zero or trend becomes strong
decomposition_role: trend gates regime; cycle defines fair value; residual is traded deviation

entry_rule: trend leg in strong-trend regime, reversion leg in weak-trend regime
exit_rule: same as selected leg or regime change
decomposition_role: uses trend strength to choose strategy family
